name: h100_48gpu_dgx_multibox
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX Hopper H100 multi-box deployment: 6 8-GPU boxes (6×8 = 48 GPU topology, 48 GPUs in active use). Intra-box: NVLink4 900 GB/s bidir (450 GB/s single-direction) per GPU through 4 NVSwitch chips. Inter-box: ConnectX-7 NDR InfiniBand (400 Gbps = 50 GB/s single-direction per GPU through dedicated NIC), ~2.5 μs IB transport latency. A collective ≤8 ranks stays on nvlink4; collectives spanning 48 ranks escalate to ib (paying α = 1.0 + 2.5 = 3.5 us and being bandwidth-floored to 50 GB/s). Same chip as h100.8gpu single-box spec.
